title: [1.7.1] Deprecation warnings for retired clientPaths
description: 1.7.1 release task. Doctor warns when fabric.config.json has clientPaths.{windsurf,rooCode,geminiCLI} keys present; --fix auto-strips them; writes legacy_client_path_present ledger event. Zod schema preserves passthrough() so users don't see hard validation errors. CHANGELOG 1.7.1 entry. docs/migration-1.8.md Section 1 (客户端范围变更) filled. NO code removal yet — that's TASK-012 in 1.8.0.

files.change: NEW fixable check `legacy_client_path_present`: detect clientPaths.{windsurf,rooCode,geminiCLI}; --fix removes keys; writes legacy_client_path_present ledger event
Verify zod passthrough() in place (no validation errors on legacy keys)
1.7.1 unreleased section: Deprecated entries for windsurf, rooCode, geminiCLI
Fill Section 1 (客户端范围变更): list deprecated clients + migration commands + timeline (1.7.1 deprecation → 1.8.0 removal)
Test: doctor warns on legacy clientPaths; --fix removes them; ledger event written

criteria: --fix removes them and writes ledger event
User configs with legacy keys still parse (passthrough verified)
